name: getLocation
description: Generate Google Street View image URLs, interactive Street View links, and Google Maps URLs for one or more locations. Optionally returns driving directions text. Always generate fresh URLs and ALWAYS print every link that is returned in the tool output (do not omit any links). Supports legacy snake_case parameters for backward compatibility. Keep this manifest at version 1.

locations.description: List of location names or 'lat,lng' coordinate pairs. The last entry is the destination.

route.description: If true, treat all entries as a route: origin → optional waypoints → destination.

streetSize.description: Static Street View image size, for example '640x400' (optional).

streetFov.description: Field of view in degrees for the Street View camera (optional).
